---
title: "Markets"
---

# 📊 Market Intelligence

<div class="glass-card">

Daho Wealth tracks market activity across U.S. stocks, BRVM, and NGX Nigeria through a live multi-market financial data platform.

[Launch Live Market Dashboard](http://32.192.35.243:8000/market){.btn .btn-primary}

</div>

<div class="feature-grid">

<div class="metric-card">

## 🇺🇸 U.S. Stocks

Track high-growth technology, AI, energy, healthcare, and strategic equity portfolios.

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 🌍 BRVM / UEMOA

Comprehensive coverage of Francophone West African equity markets.

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 🇳🇬 Nigerian Exchange

Daily Nigerian market activity including prices, volume, and value traded.

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 🌐 Future Expansion

Upcoming coverage includes additional African exchanges, economic datasets, commodities, and macroeconomic indicators.

</div>

</div>

---

<div class="glass-card">

## Dashboard Features

- 📈 Top gainers and losers
- 📊 Volume leaders
- 💵 USD conversion
- 📉 Historical charts
- 🏢 Clickable stock pages
- 🌍 Cross-market analysis

</div>

<div class="glass-card">

## Integrated Market Infrastructure

The Daho Wealth market platform combines:

- ⚡ Automated market data ingestion
- 🗄️ SQL-backed historical storage
- 📊 Time-series visualization
- 💵 Currency normalization
- 🌐 Multi-exchange integration
- 🏢 Company-level market intelligence

This infrastructure is designed to support financial dashboards, research tools, and future investor education products.

</div>

<div class="site-footer">
  <p>
    © 2026 Daho Wealth • Financial & Economic Intelligence Platform
  </p>

  <p>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jpsossavi/" target="_blank">
      LinkedIn
    </a>

    •

    <a href="https://www.facebook.com/p/Daho-Wealth-61575871481173/" target="_blank">
      Facebook
    </a>
  </p>
</div>
